column3: More Information For Specific Diety Explanations Listed Below
Follower (Up To is based on 200% Favor)
column4: Devotee (Up To is based on 200% Favor)

column3: Attacks, spells, scrolls, shouts and enchantments are up to 30% stronger against dragons and Miraak.
column4: Praying resets the cooldown of your last used shout and power. Craft a powerful amulet with 5 of each of the nine divines amulets. (has all their effects x2 and T2 H/M/S)

column3: Take up to 20% less damage from attacks/spells when blocking. Deal up to 20% more damage to enemies who are directly facing you.
column4: Healing from most sources is increased by up to 20%. Wards are up to 30% cheaper to cast.

column3: Regenerate up to 5% of Max Health based on missing health. Can perform Arkay's Rites.
column4: Revive after death for 50% favor. Attribute fortifying spells are up to 20% stronger.

column3: Deal up to 20% more and take up to 20% less damage from vampires. Auriel's bow uses up to 80% less charge
column4: Bows, crossbows and sun spells are up to 20% better. Wearing Elven, Glass or Ancient Falmer armor set increases Glass and Elven damage by up to 20%

column3: Enemies within 100 feet can't absorb spells and have up to 20% reduced magic resist. Blind/Chameleon spells are up to 25% cheaper.
column4: Activate an enemy below 30 - 60% health based on favor to paralyze them with 1 health. Soul trapping spells cost up to 40% less.

column3: Pickpocketing and selling to fences is up to 50% better. Alchemical powders deal up to 30% more damage and oils gain 2 extra uses.
column4: Place skooma in enemy inventory to detonate it within 250 feet. Skooma can no longer kill you. Throwing knives do up to 50% more damage.

column3: Deal up to more 30% damage when facing only one foe.
column4: Meditate to gain invisibility for 90 seconds, when broken by sneak attack deal up to 25% more damage.

column3: Conjuration spells are up to 20% stonger, pray to accept a pact which potentially grants a perk point
column4: Pray for a perk point, costs 99% favor. Most teleporting and traversal spells are up to 50% cheaper.

column3: Take up to 20% less damage when you have lovers comfort and an ally in combat or when you have 2 or more allies.
column4: Activate a person in combat to unequip them and make them follow you for 90 seconds. Illusion spells are up to 15% stronger or longer lasting, twice that for charm, rally and command spells.

column3: 1H raises damage blocked, Block raises AR and HA raises phys dmg. 15% each at 100 skill. 2x in an Oblivion Realm.
column4: Reduced armor rating within 40 feet by up to 200 and gain the armor, double against daedra. Bonus to frost and shock resist when wearing Ebony Armor.

column3: Find Eldritch Pages on corpses. Similar Eldritch Pages can be bound to create Eldritch Tomes that improve magic and shouts.
column4: Pray to permanently raise a skill, costs 10% favor. Entropic spells are up to 20% stronger.

column3: Deal up to 60% more damage to living targets down to under 50% health.
column4: Pray to reveal living targets within 500 feet, exposing them to bitter mercy. Can deal up to 30% more damage to undead under half health if you're a werebeast.

column3: Take up to 20% less damage when unarmored, up to 50% less from animals. Meat is 2x as strong, plant based food provides no benefit.
column4: Health and stamina quickly restores outdoors and out of combat. Deal up to 20% more physical damage when unarmored. Praying to Jephre brings clear weather.

column3: All spells last up to 25% longer and hostile spells are up to 20% weaker
column4: All spells have up to 25% more magnitude based on favor.

column3: Collect 8 Obelisks of Order to Fortify Health/Magicka/Stamina by 20 each.
column4: Activate an enemy to etherealize them for 3 seconds. Take no damage while staggered

column3: Plant-based food has 1.5x magnitude/duration. Up to 25% damage and critical damage with bows/daggers when not sneaking.
column4: Pray to summon a sabre cat. Friendly animals and spirit summons have their attributes healed healed 5 per second. +10% critical hit chance with bows/daggers while not sneaking.

column3: All melee attacks pierce through up to 30% of enemy armor.
column4: Pray to gain up to 50% more melee damage against enemies with full hp for 60 minutes or 10 battles.

column3: No magicka regen, When holding a staff: up to 20% stronger touch or rune spells, up to 50% less charge use.
column4: Being under the influence of a magicka potion causes soul gems to recharge up to 50% more. Potions and ingredients restore up to 50% more magicka.

column3: Power attacks deal up to 15% more damage and use up to 15% less stamina.
column4: When an enemy dies within 20 feet, their killer restores health based on overkill amount and favor.

column3: Summoned undead last up to 20% longer and necrotic spells are up to 10% stronger.
column4: Allied undead conjurations deal up to 20% more physical damage.

column3: Attributes restored 0.5 per second with lowered hands. Restoration is up to 20% stronger. Praying cures diseases.
column4: Allies, but not summons, within 100 feet are healed by up to 20 points health and magicka per second. Take 25% less physical damage with lowered hands.

column3: Pray to self immolate which grants more favor and Burning Path activations. Craft potions of immolation at the cooking pot.
column4: Nearby enemies burnup to 40 per second and explode upon death. Destruction spells are up to 10% better and nearby friendly Daedra have their attributes healed 5 per second.

column3: Sneak attacks deal up to 20% more damage from behind when not wearing heavy armor.
column4: During prayer sieze the nearest person within 75 feet to fight for you. Follower ability buffed to up to 30% sneak damage.

column3: Fire, sun, turning spells are up to 20% stronger. Physical attacks are up to 30% stronger against undead.
column4: Activate an undead within combat to cast a solar strike dealing massive damage, costs 50% favor.

column3: Absorb up to 10 magicka and stamina per second from nearby enemies.
column4: Activate a hostile enemy below level 50 to cast them to cold harbor, pray to gain their items. Blood magic spells are up to 20% stronger.

column3: Praying out of combat heals you & allies up to 200/s. Enemies drop milk & honey which can be used to make a strong curative potion.
column4: Praying blesses you with powerful fruit that restores attributes. Fruit can be combined with milk and honey to make stronger versions.

column3: Reduce poison resist by up to 40% against enemies within 100 feet. Grants strong stomach and strange meat on kill.
column4: Poisoning or putting a human heart on an enemy damages their armor rating by up to 200 and dealing up to 40 disease damage.

column3: Praying removes up to 5000 gold of your bounty. Shadow spells are up to 30% better, 50% at night.
column4: Better sneak and pickpocketing at night, able to astrally observe nearest person within 300 feet.

column3: Poison spells are up to 20% stronger, pray for Peryite's gifts to gain favor.
column4: Activate living to give all of Peryites Gifts to them and deal 20 disease damage per second for each one.

column3: Take up to 20% less physical and magical damage, 50% attribute regeneration and immunity to stagger while standing still.
column4: During prayer you can teleport to the last location prayed at. Gain 25% absorb chance and 100% poison and disease resist while not moving.

column3: Chance to find large amounts of gold in containers. Most sneak or thieving related potions and spells last up to twice as long.
column4: Pray to break a lock within 20 feet. No fall damage when wearing no heavy armor, chance to gain extremely valuable loot (including Jarrin Root) on killed enemies while tresspassing.

column3: Meditate to gamble gold. 1 health/stamina per second, 25% less damage sprinting, 10% slower and -100% stamina regen when not.
column4: Placing 1000 gold on a bet also puts 1 stamina up for stake. Random chance to deal or take more or less damage.

column3: Gain 100% regeneration under the effects of alcohol, skooma or harmful alchemy. Alcohol is up to 100% stronger.
column4: Pray in combat to force nearest hostile to dance for 20 seconds. Dancing targets take up to 20% more damage.

column3: Every 30 days passed gain 100 AR and 2% spell absorb. At 365 days caps to 1250 and 25% absorb chance.
column4: Pray to become reborn, allowing you to move points between attributes.

column3: Pray for random touch of madness. Cheese is 2x stronger.
column4: Receive touch of madness when entering combat. All skills at or below lvl 25 are 20% better.

column3: Take almost no poise damage. Deal up to 15% more and take up to 15% less physical damage to non-human or animal races.
column4: When in combat with a mighty foe, Shor sends a Shield-Thane to assist. Pray to recharge. Elemental resist increased by 15%.

column3: Up to 25% harder to detect by enemies within 30 feet, chance to find extra loot on humanoids and daedra.
column4: When sneaking and not detected, activate door to create a void, pulling in and damaging all enemies within 60 feet.

column3: Enchanting is up to 15% stronger. Up to 20% stronger wind and telekenetic spells.
column4: Using a filled soul gem or dynamo core, permanently summon a Dwarven automaton to fight for you. Shock spells are up to 20% stronger.

column2: 100 Armor Rating and 10% Magic Resist for Followers
column3: Pray to select a blessing of the divines which is up to 100% stronger. Take up to 20% less damage from humans incuding Miraak
column4: While under divine blessing, may talk to non-hostile npcs to potentially befriend and make them a follower.

column3: Take up to 50% less magic and physical damage as your health decreases. Attacks against undead, werewolves and daedra restore health.
column4: During prayer, gain up to 20% improved physical damage and healing for 300 seconds.

column3: More likely to find spell tomes, scrolls and staves on enemies. Up to 20% stronger arcane spells.
column4: All spells cost up to 20% less to cast based on favor.

column3: Bound weapon and armor spells are up to 20% stronger. Enchantments use up to 40% less charge.
column4: On death, etherealize. If combat ends while ethereal, you are brought back to life. Ghosts deal up to 50% less damage to you.

column3: Attacks are up to 20% stronger against playable races, snow elves and Falmer.
column4: Shout cooldown halved when enemy within 20 feet dies.

column3: Bonuses from The All Maker Stones are doubled. Gain up to 10% weapon damage while having an unused All Maker Stone Power.
column4: After using an All-Maker Stone power, pray to the All-Maker to have it restored to you. Doomstones have double the effect (stacks with Aetherial Crown)

column3: Meditate to gain up to a 60 point bonus to all attributes for up to 1000 seconds
column4: Absorb up to 40% stamina and magicka from nearby dead creatures and people. Sleeping tree sap lasts up to 20 times longer and is up to 100% stronger.

column3: Staggering enemies reduces their armor rating by up to 300 for 60 seconds.
column4: 25% chance to take no poise damage, take 25% more/less damage if staggered/not staggered, deal 25% more damage to staggered enemies.

column3: Gain 50 points of weapon charge per second out of combat, 5 in combat, up to their charge level when last equipped or recharged.
column4: During prayer, the Magne-Ge can teleport you to a location within line of sight.  Up to 10% stronger cloak and alteration spells.

column3: Pray to sacrifice 100 gold to gain the abilities of an animal. Deal/take up to 15% more/less damage in full Forsworn/Fur/Hide/Leather armor.
column4: Able to assume the powers of a dragon. Frost spells deal up to 20% more damage.

column3: Gain bonuses based on day of the week. See table below.
column4: During prayer, an ancient Mane will grant a blessing they believe to be appropriate. Bonuses from day cycles are doubled.

column3: Attacks deal up to 20% more when health is above 90% and also 20% more when stamina is above 90% (stacks to 40% with both).
column4: When praying, you may become ethereal and invulnerable until your next attack.

column3: Influence Illusion spells work against up to 20 higher level enemies and cost up to 50% less outside of combat.
column4: Activate a sleeping person to summon an illusion to accompany you for ten hours. Illusion spells are up to 10% stronger when not rested.

column3: Speech and intimidation is up to 60% easier. Light melee attacks deal up to 30% more damage.
column4: Critical hit damage and chance is increased up to 20% when not power attacking. Your attributes are always trying to pull each other into equilibrium.

column3: 2 Additional point from reading skill books. Scrolls scale based on enchanting skill 20% at level 100 enchanting.
column4: Pray to ascend in a trance, revealing characters in a large radius. Scrolls scale based on you magic skill level of the scroll type 20% at 100 skill level.

column3: Making potions is up to 15% better. Gain 1 extra potion crafted.
column4: Pray to open an unlimited extradimensional storage space. Gain 2 extra poison doses.

column3: Tempering items is up to 15% better. Deal up to 10% more damage with unenchanted weapons.
column4: Pray to Zenithar to buy and sell items directly. Able to craft perk potions at Aetherium Forge for 100k gold and 10 of each ingot.
